description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a medium-gray fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest for a boxy silhouette. The upholstery is a solid color with a subtle woven texture, giving the surface a matte, soft appearance. The legs are short and mostly recessed, making them barely visible and giving the sofa a low-profile, grounded look. This piece would be well-suited for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or modern outdoor parks.
description: A modern, gray three-seater sofa with broad armrests, uniform cushions, and a subtle woven fabric texture. Its low-profile design and solid build make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all rectangular and aligned in a single row; cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, recessed legs, likely four or more, minimally visible and possibly made of dark wood or metal, providing a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with three attached, rectangular cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa and lacking tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
